thinks.think: A black background displays centered text in a cursive, handwritten-style font. The top line reads "Pakistan versus India," with stars replacing dots on the 'i's. Below, the text "Wagah border ceremony" is visible. The text color shifts from a dim grey in the initial frame to a bright, solid white in the subsequent frame, suggesting a fade-in or brightness increase.

The copyright text "© Stef Hoffer" fades in at the bottom right of the title card. The video then cuts to a wide, high-angle shot of a hazy urban street scene crowded with vehicles like white vans and auto-rickshaws. In the background, a large white mosque with two tall minarets stands prominently against the sky.

The high-angle view persists on a hazy, bustling street intersection filled with traffic. White vans queue on the right while green auto-rickshaws and motorcycles move through the center. Pedestrians wander near the roadsides. In the background, a large white mosque with two tall minarets stands prominently against the orange sky. The watermark remains.

The video cuts to a bright, sunlit view of a massive, ornate stone building featuring Gothic-revival architecture, a central clock tower, and domes. A red bus drives towards the right in the foreground, passing black and yellow taxis on the busy street below. The sky is clear blue.

The scene continues showing the ornate, Gothic-style stone building with a central clock tower under a clear blue sky. A red bus travels rightward across the foreground, passing black-and-yellow taxis and a white truck moving left on the busy street. Pedestrians are visible near the building's base, and the copyright watermark remains in the lower right corner.

The scene shifts to a grassy field where men in traditional loose tunics play cricket. A bowler in grey delivers the ball towards a batsman holding a white bat, while others watch near a large red sandstone wall with arches in the background. Trees frame the scene, and the copyright watermark remains visible.

The batsman in grey completes a high swing with the bat. The bowler in white dives onto the grass, generating a cloud of dust near the wickets. Fielders in traditional tunics observe the play against the backdrop of a large red sandstone wall with arches.

The video cuts to a wide shot of a massive red sandstone mosque featuring three large white domes and tall minarets under a hazy orange sky. The sun appears as a pale disc above the central dome. In the foreground, a vast courtyard shows small figures of people walking or sitting near the base of the structure's arched entrance.

A large green flag with a white vertical stripe and a white crescent moon waves vigorously in the foreground, dominating the frame. Behind the fluttering fabric, a blurry, light-colored building structure with a rooftop antenna is visible against a pale sky. The copyright watermark remains superimposed in the lower right area.

The green flag with a white crescent and star waves in the wind. The scene then cuts to a close-up of a dark stone building facade featuring Gothic architectural details like spires and gargoyles. An Indian tricolor flag flies from a pole positioned centrally in front of the building's ornate archway against a blue sky.

The static shot persists on the upper facade of the dark stone Gothic building. The Indian tricolor flag continues to wave gently from the central pole, displaying its saffron, white, and green stripes along with the blue wheel. Intricate architectural details, including gargoyles and spires, frame the flag against the clear sky.

The scene cuts to a view from inside a moving auto-rickshaw, showing the back of a bearded driver wearing a white cap. Through the vehicle's frame, a busy street is visible with green auto-rickshaws and white vans passing in traffic. The copyright watermark remains in the lower right corner.

A donkey cart loaded with scrap metal parts travels down a street, guided by a man in white standing on the cargo. Blue auto-rickshaws and motorcycles pass by, while a cyclist rides on the right. Multi-story buildings with shop signs line the background under a hazy sky, and the copyright watermark is visible.

The scene shifts to a paved border area with brick pillars where uniformed soldiers stand. In the foreground, a man with a white beard wears a bright green tunic with white script on the back and raises his right arm. Soldiers in khaki uniforms holding rifles walk nearby, while a crowd gathers behind barriers in the distance.

A man in a green tunic with white script on the back raises a large green flag high with his right hand. Soldiers in khaki uniforms walk nearby, one gesturing to the side. In the background, guards in dark uniforms and tall hats stand in formation near brick pillars while a crowd watches from behind barriers.

A man in a green tunic with white script on the back holds a large green flag high. Soldiers in khaki uniforms walk nearby, one carrying a rifle. In the background, guards in dark uniforms and tall hats stand in formation near brick pillars. Spectators watch from behind barriers under a hazy sky.

A man in a green tunic featuring a white crescent and star walks forward carrying a large drum. Behind him, rows of green stadium seats sit on a raised platform with spectators. A brick building with arches forms the backdrop. A soldier in khaki stands nearby, while a figure in a dark uniform enters from the right.

The man in the green tunic continues walking while playing a large drum past green stadium seats. A soldier in a black uniform with a red sash walks towards the right side of the paved area. In the final frame, a hand enters from the left edge, pointing a finger upward.

The view cuts to a border gate area where white metal gates display green flag designs. A man in a black shirt with white text on the back stands centrally, waving a large green flag with both arms raised. Soldiers in khaki uniforms stand guard on either side, while a crowd watches from elevated stands in the background.

A man in a black shirt with white text and white trousers stands centrally, waving a large green flag on a pole with arms raised. Soldiers in khaki uniforms holding rifles flank him. Behind them is a white metal gate featuring green crescent and star designs, with spectators visible in elevated stands.

A close-up captures two men in green shirts with white crescents and stars raising their clasped hands. One man wears a green cap and sunglasses, displaying 'IMRAN PAKISTAN' text on his chest. Spectators sit in green stadium seats behind them, while a dark rifle butt is visible in the immediate left foreground.

Two men in green shirts separate their raised hands; the man on the left holds a white pole while the man on the right grips a bamboo pole attached to a green flag. The man on the right looks upward toward the flag. Spectators sit in green chairs behind them, and a dark rifle butt remains visible in the immediate left foreground.

The scene cuts to a wide view of a white metal border gate featuring green flag designs. Two soldiers in black ceremonial uniforms with tall plumed hats stand near the gate, while a soldier in khaki holding a rifle stands to the right. Spectators are visible in the stands behind the gate.

The scene shifts to a crowd of spectators seated in tiered stands. In the immediate foreground, a man wearing a dark green shirt with "IMRAN PAKISTAN" text on the back and a matching cap faces the audience, which consists largely of men and boys.

The view persists on the man in the green shirt with "IMRAN PAKISTAN" text on the back, facing the seated crowd. The audience of men and boys in the stands continues to observe, with some shifting their gaze, while the man remains stationary in the foreground.

The man in the dark green shirt featuring white "IMRAN PAKISTAN" text on the back stands stationary in the foreground, facing the audience. The dense crowd of men and boys seated in the tiered stands behind him remains largely still, observing the scene ahead with focused attention.

The man in the dark green shirt with 'IMRAN PAKISTAN' text stands with his back to the camera, facing the tiered stands filled with men and boys. The spectators remain seated, observing the event, with some individuals shifting their gaze or interacting quietly while watching the proceedings ahead.

The scene cuts to a dense crowd of women and girls seated in tiered stands. They are dressed in vibrant traditional attire with headscarves in shades of pink, white, red, and yellow. Many spectators are clapping their hands rhythmically while looking ahead. The copyright text remains in the corner.

The shot remains on the large crowd of women and girls seated in the tiered stands. They wear colorful traditional garments and headscarves in pink, white, and yellow. The spectators continue clapping their hands enthusiastically while facing forward. A few individuals hold up mobile phones to record the event. The watermark is present.

A large crowd of women and girls sits in tiered stands, wearing colorful traditional attire with headscarves in pink, white, yellow, and green. Most spectators clap their hands rhythmically while facing forward, observing the event. The copyright watermark remains visible in the lower right corner throughout the static shot.

A large group of women and girls in colorful headscarves fills the tiered stands. They clap rhythmically, with several raising fists or hands in the air while chanting. The spectators wear vibrant traditional clothing in shades of pink, white, and yellow, facing forward towards the event.

A dense crowd of men and boys in tiered seating claps and watches forward. In the foreground, a man in a dark green shirt with white text on the back raises both arms high. Simultaneously, a large green flag with a white crescent moon waves vigorously into the frame from the right side, partially obscuring the spectators.

A man in a dark green shirt with a large white crescent and star on the chest raises both arms high while shouting. Behind him, a dense crowd of men and boys claps rhythmically. To the right, a large green flag waves vigorously, partially obscuring the spectators in the background.

The view cuts to a dense crowd of women and girls in tiered stands wearing colorful headscarves. Many spectators shout with open mouths while raising fists in the air enthusiastically. They wear vibrant traditional attire in shades of pink, purple, and white, facing forward towards the event.

The dense crowd of female spectators in tiered stands continues cheering enthusiastically. Women and girls wearing vibrant headscarves in shades of pink, purple, and white shout with open mouths while raising fists in the air. They face forward, keeping their arms raised and mouths open in a continuous display of support.

The view remains fixed on the tiered seating area packed with female spectators. Women and girls wearing vibrant pink, purple, and white headscarves continue to shout and cheer. Many individuals raise their clenched fists high in the air simultaneously, while others clap their hands rhythmically in support.

The scene cuts to ceremonial soldiers standing at the border gate. Two guards on the left wear black tunics with tall black fan-shaped hats holding rifles. Opposite them, two guards wear khaki uniforms with tall red fan-shaped hats. A dense crowd of spectators fills the tiered stands in the background behind lamp posts and banners.

The camera zooms in on two soldiers in black tunics wearing tall black fan-shaped hats with red bands, holding rifles. They stand on the left facing right. The soldiers in khaki uniforms are out of frame. A dense crowd of spectators fills the background behind black lamp posts and red banners.

The camera maintains a steady shot of two soldiers in black ceremonial uniforms wearing tall black fan-shaped hats with red bands. They hold rifles and stand in profile facing right, while a dense crowd of spectators watches from behind black lamp posts displaying red and black banners.

The view cuts to a close-up of a bearded soldier facing forward in a black uniform with a red and white striped neckerchief. He wears a black hat with a red band and silver emblem, with gold and colorful medals on his chest above a name tag reading "ISTIKHAR." Spectators in light clothing stand in the background.

The bearded soldier in the black uniform with a red-banded hat and medals remains in a steady close-up, facing forward with a serious expression. Behind him, spectators in light-colored clothing stand in rows, with some clapping visible in the background. The camera maintains focus on the soldier's upper body and face.

The view cuts to a wide shot of the ceremonial ground. Soldiers in black uniforms with tall black fan-shaped hats stand near soldiers in khaki uniforms with red fan-shaped hats. One soldier in black marches toward the right gate. Black lamp posts and red banners are positioned before a large crowd seated in tiered stands.

A soldier in a black uniform with a tall black hat marches with a high kick towards the right gate. Another soldier in khaki stands in the foreground facing away. Soldiers in black and khaki uniforms stand at attention nearby while the crowd watches from the stands.

A soldier in a black uniform with a tall black hat marches toward the right gate with a high kick. Simultaneously, a soldier in a khaki uniform with a red fan-shaped hat marches forward, lifting his left leg high. Spectators fill the tiered stands in the background.

A soldier in a black uniform with a tall black hat raises a brass trumpet to his lips. Nearby, soldiers in khaki uniforms with red fan-shaped hats stand in formation. The background remains filled with a dense crowd of spectators seated in tiered stands behind red and black banners.

Soldiers in black uniforms with tall black hats stand near soldiers in khaki with red fan hats. One soldier in black holds a brass trumpet to his lips while another beside him raises his right arm high, gripping a thin white cord. Spectators fill the tiered stands in the background behind red and black banners.

A wide shot displays a green flag with a white crescent and a tricolor flag raised high above the border gate. Soldiers in black uniforms salute on the left, while a soldier in khaki stands in the foreground holding a rifle. Large brown pillars frame the scene with a dense crowd in the background.

Two large flags, one green with a white crescent and one tricolor, wave vigorously above the border gate. Soldiers in black uniforms hold a salute on the left, while a soldier in khaki stands in the foreground with a rifle. Large brown pillars frame the scene, and a dense crowd fills the background stands.

In the foreground, a soldier wearing a khaki uniform and black cap turns his head to face the camera. Behind him, soldiers in black uniforms maintain a salute while large green and tricolor flags wave vigorously above the border gate structure. A dense crowd of spectators fills the tiered stands in the background.

A soldier in a khaki uniform and black cap turns to face right while holding a rifle in the foreground. Behind him, soldiers in black uniforms with tall hats continue saluting. Large green and tricolor flags wave above the border gate structure against a backdrop of dense spectators in the stands.

A soldier in a khaki uniform and black cap stands in the foreground holding a rifle, turning his body from right to left. Behind him, soldiers in black uniforms with tall hats continue to salute while large green and tricolor flags wave vigorously above the border gate structure against a backdrop of spectators.

Soldiers in black uniforms lower and fold the large green and tricolor flags near the gate structure. In the foreground, a soldier in a khaki uniform holding a rifle stands facing left, observing the ceremony, while other uniformed personnel maintain their positions nearby.

Soldiers in black uniforms march away carrying folded green and white flags. One soldier performs a high kick while moving forward. A soldier in a khaki uniform stands in the foreground facing left. The crowd remains seated in the background stands.

Soldiers in black uniforms with red sashes and tall black hats march forward in formation. One soldier carries a folded green and white flag. The camera cuts to a closer view of their faces and upper bodies as they move away from the gate area.

Soldiers in black uniforms with red sashes and tall black hats march forward. One soldier carries a folded green flag. The camera shows a closer view of their faces and upper bodies as they move past a red gate structure. Spectators are visible in the background behind a white railing.

Soldiers in black uniforms with red sashes and tall black hats march rightward past a red gate structure. One soldier carries a folded green flag while spectators watch from behind a white railing in the background. The camera tracks their movement, focusing on their upper bodies and faces as they proceed.

Soldiers in black uniforms march toward a brick archway labeled "PAKISTAN" and "باب آزادی". The view shifts to the roof where a soldier pulls a rope near a large portrait of a man. Three soldiers stand on a balcony below, and Urdu text appears on a green sign above the portrait near the roofline.

A soldier on a white roof pulls a rope near a large portrait. Three guards stand on a balcony below labeled 'PAKISTAN' and Urdu script. The scene fades to black, darkening the building and figures. The soldier maintains his position holding the rope.

[86-90] A soldier in a black uniform with a tall black hat marches toward the right gate with a high kick, while a soldier in a khaki uniform with a red fan-shaped hat marches forward lifting his left leg. Simultaneously, a soldier in black raises a brass trumpet to his lips as soldiers in khaki stand in formation. [90-92] Another soldier in black raises his right arm high, gripping a thin white cord near the trumpet player. [92-96] A wide shot displays a green flag with a white crescent and a tricolor flag raised high above the border gate. Soldiers in black uniforms salute on the left, while a soldier in khaki stands in the foreground holding a rifle. Large brown pillars frame the scene with a dense crowd in the background. The text "© Stef Hoffer" appears on screen.

[96-106] In the foreground, a soldier wearing a khaki uniform and black cap holding a rifle turns his head and body while observing the scene. Behind him, soldiers in black uniforms with tall hats maintain a salute as large green and tricolor flags wave vigorously above the border gate structure. The soldiers in black then lower and fold the flags near the gate. Finally, the soldiers in black uniforms march away carrying the folded green and white flags, with one soldier performing a high kick, while a dense crowd of spectators fills the tiered stands in the background. The watermark "© Stef Hoffer" appears in the lower right.
